OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management, is present. Represented by Hugo Sandoval
Attorney, John Zanghi, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Rodney Lawson, is present.
Attorney, Ted Janowsky , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem A. M. Young, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 303B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAY-02-2011 is vacated.
